function.name: list_shows
function.description:
List drone shows in the project.

If `status` is omitted, returns every ACTIVE show (excludes Complete).
If `status` is given, returns only shows in that status. Valid statuses:
Sales, Contract, Show Design, Show Operations, Complete.

Returns: {"shows": [{"key", "summary", "status"}, ...]}

function.name: get_show
function.description:
Look up a single drone show by Jira key (e.g. 'KAN-9') or fuzzy text
matched against the ticket summary (e.g. 'Toronto', 'Bariloche').

function.name: list_shows_by_field
function.description: Find shows by a value inside the description, OR pull a field across shows.

section.description: Section name from the schema (e.g. 'Lead Info', 'Event Details').
section.title: Section

field.description: Field name within that section (e.g. 'ADHOC Sales Contact', 'Estimated Budget').
field.title: Field

value.description:
If given, return only shows where the field substring-matches this
     (case-insensitive). If omitted, return ALL shows that have the field
     populated, including the field's current value — useful for
     'highest budget' or 'all project doc links'.
value.title: Value

status.description: If given, filter to shows in this status only.
status.title: Status

function.name: create_show
function.description: Create a new drone show ticket in the project.

summary.description:
Ticket title. PRD convention: 'Company/Organization - Location'
     where Location is 'City, Country' (e.g. 'SkyTech Berlin - Berlin, Germany').
summary.title: Summary

fields.description:
A dict of {section_name: {field_name: value}}. Must include
     every field of Contact Info and Lead Info, populated with a
     real value or 'N/A'. Blank values are rejected.
fields.title: Fields

function.name: transition_show
function.description:
Advance a show to the next status in the pipeline, with required-field
validation.

Pipeline (forward only, no skipping):
    Sales -> Contract -> Show Design -> Show Operations -> Complete

target_status.description:
The status to enter. Must be exactly one step forward
           from the show's current status.
target_status.title: Target Status

new_fields.description:
{section_name: {field_name: value}} — fields collected
           from the user for the target status. Merged into the
           existing description before validation.
new_fields.title: New Fields
